description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
commit_message:
Cap helix log extraction in test-quarantine workflow (#67047)

* Extract Helix [FAIL] blocks runner-side to cap token usage

The test-quarantine agent downloads Helix console logs (10MB+) and was
surfacing them into its context, driving the per-run effective-token cost
into the 25M AWF hard rail. Instruct the agent to extract only the [FAIL]
blocks (with their Error Message/Stack Trace sections) inside the python3
script and print just those, with per-block and total output caps. This is
lossles
